description_long: This is a modern L-shaped chaise upholstered in a smooth, solid gray fabric. The chaise features a high, gently curved backrest that extends seamlessly into one armrest on the left side, while the right side is open to accommodate the extended lounge section. The seat consists of three distinct, rectangular cushions, with the rightmost cushion forming the extended chaise portion. The legs are short, straight, and appear to be made of dark wood, providing a subtle contrast to the upholstery. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The surface appears soft and comfortable, with no visible decorative elements or patterns.
description: A modern L-shaped gray chaise with a high curved backrest, one armrest, and three seat cushions, supported by short dark wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat cushions, high backrest, and left-side armrest.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlighting the curved backrest, single armrest, and the extended lounge section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the chaise's overall width.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective emphasizing the open end of the chaise and the extended lounge area.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high, gently curved, and continuous, providing full support along the rear and left side of the chaise. It is smooth and unadorned, with no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: There is a single armrest on the left side, integrated smoothly into the backrest, while the right side is open.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and made of dark wood, with a simple, unembellished design that complements the minimalist style of the chaise.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three rectangular seat cushions: two on the main seating area and one forming the extended chaise section. All cushions appear to be attached and evenly arranged, providing a uniform seating surface.
